papergraph.title: Garnet interface
papergraph.abstract: We propose a garnet electrolyte for solid-state lithium battery interface stability. Experiments report ionic conductivity and cycle life. High-voltage degradation remains unclear.
papergraph.conclusion: We propose a garnet electrolyte for solid-state lithium battery interface stability. Experiments report ionic conductivity and cycle life. High-voltage degradation remains unclear.
